task_completion.description: Navigate to the Electric Inspection operator edit page in the Aerobridge admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser shows the Django admin edit page for the operator 'Electric Inspection'.
In the 'Authorized activities' selection box, both 'photographing' and 'videotaping' are selected/highlighted.
In the 'Operational authorizations' selection box, both 'SORA V2' and 'SORA' are selected/highlighted.
The 'Operator type' dropdown menu is set to 'Non-LUC'.
A success message (typically a green banner) stating that the operator 'Electric Inspection' was changed successfully, or the browser returns to the operator list view after clicking save.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (like Chromium/Firefox) navigating the Aerobridge admin interface, not terminal commands like curl.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or database shells to update the record
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing sqlite3, psql, or python manage.py shell commands modifying the operator record.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Aerobridge Django admin interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Django admin styling with the correct URL (localhost:8000/admin/...) and is not a mocked HTML file or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Operator: 'Electric Inspection'. Expected final state: Authorized activities must include both 'photographing' and 'videotaping'. Operational authorizations must include both 'SORA V2' and 'SORA'. Operator type must be set to 'Non-LUC' (internal value 2). The interface is the Aerobridge Django admin at http://localhost:8000/admin/.
